## Title: Fix invalid PLMN initialization causing NAS protocol state machine violations

### Summary
The `make_plmn_from_conf()` function initializes PLMN structures with `memset(&plmn, 0xff, sizeof(plmn))`, which fills all digits with invalid BCD values. According to 3GPP TS 24.008, PLMN digits must be BCD-encoded (0-9), and 0xFF is not a valid digit. When these malformed PLMNs are used in NAS protocol state machines, they cause specification violations and unpredictable state transitions. Addi
